title: Support artifact auto completion in podman inspect
body:
Autocompletion for `podman inspect` now includes artifact names, matching the behavior of other object types like containers, images, pods, networks, and volumes.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

fixes #28671

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
Fixed a bug where shell completion for `artifact` types was missing when using the `inspect --type artifact` command.
```

comments.body:
I force-pushed after noticing the following issues.

```
// as-is: ... + len(volumes))
	suggestions := make([]string, 0, len(containers)+len(images)+len(pods)+len(networks)+len(volumes))
// to-be: ... + len(volumes) + len(artifact))
	suggestions := make([]string, 0, len(containers)+len(images)+len(pods)+len(networks)+len(volumes)+len(artifact))
```

@mheon Thanks for your review!

Should I add a test case for artifact completion in [600-completion.bats](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/system/600-completion.bats)? I'd like to prevent regressions, but I'm not sure if you want more tests in that file.
